name: Exstellarknight Constellar Ptolemy Ω7
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超神星輝士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エクステラナイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> セイクリッド・トレミス<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ω</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>オメガ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>７</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>セブン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl_base: Super Divine Star Bright Knight Sacred Ptolemy's Ω7
desc:
3 Level 7 monsters
Once per turn, during your Main Phase 2, you can also Xyz Summon "Exstellarknight Constellar Ptolemy Ω7" by using a "tellarknight" or "Constellar" Xyz Monster you control (transfer its materials). While you have 7 or more "tellarknight" monsters with different names in your GY and/or banishment, this card gains 2700 ATK/DEF, also it is unaffected by your opponent's activated effects. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can detach any number of materials from this card, then target that many monsters your opponent controls; shuffle them into the Deck.

action: Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's Deck
mst: Unaffected by the opponent's card effects
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
